title: SynaptEmbedding
description: Pre-computed embedding vector with provenance metadata.

model.description: Model that produced this vector (URI format: "provider://model-name").

input.description: What was embedded: "source", "summary", "entities", or custom string.

dimensions.description: Vector dimensionality (for validation without reading the full array).

space.description: Semantic space identifier. Vectors are only comparable when they share a space.
